##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Mark N Feinglos
##DESCRIPTION=Small silver water-worn nuggets associated with laurite R110120

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder, using Mo radiation

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
